scope: bounded software/CUDA evidence only; not Stage-B physical qualification

hardware.teacher_cache_device: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090, server physical GPU 1
hardware.distributed_devices: two NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090 devices, server physical GPUs 1 and 2

implementation_findings: The qualified TensorNet readout is per atom [N,128], so the prior graph-level placeholder was corrected before feature-weighted training.
The first distributed resume attempt exposed CPU-resident EMA shadows after a CPU-portable restore; EMA loading now preserves the live model device and validates tensor shape/dtype.
No model weights were qualified or promoted by these bounded smokes.
